easy.title: Create a Glossary of Programming Terms
easy.description: Create a description list that defines at least 5 programming-related terms. Use <dl> for the container, <dt> for each term, and <dd> for each definition. Include terms like HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Python, and SQL.
easy.starterCode: Programming Glossary
easy.solution:
Programming Glossary

HTML
HyperText Markup Language - the standard markup language for web pages.
CSS
Cascading Style Sheets - used to style HTML elements on a webpage.
JavaScript
A scripting language that enables dynamic and interactive web content.
Python
A high-level programming language known for readability and versatility.
SQL
Structured Query Language - used to manage and query relational databases.

medium.title: Styled Product Specification Sheet
medium.description: Create a styled description list for a product's specifications. Include at least 6 specification pairs (e.g., Brand, Model, Processor, RAM, Storage, Display). Apply CSS Grid or Flexbox to display terms and descriptions in a two-column layout. Style terms in bold with a colored background.
medium.starterCode: Product Specifications
medium.solution:
Product Specifications

Brand
TechPro
Model
UltraBook X1
Processor
Intel Core i7-12700H
RAM
16GB DDR5
Storage
512GB NVMe SSD
Display
15.6-inch 4K OLED

hard.title: Interactive Dictionary with Multiple Meanings
hard.description: Create a multi-word dictionary using description lists where some words have multiple definitions (use multiple <dd> per <dt>). Include at least 8 words, with at least 3 words having 2+ definitions. Add CSS styling with alternating backgrounds for terms and descriptions. Use <div> wrappers for each word group and add hover effects.
hard.starterCode: Interactive Dictionary
hard.solution:
Interactive Dictionary

Java
A high-level, class-based, object-oriented programming language.
Slang for coffee.
Class
A blueprint for creating objects in object-oriented programming.
A CSS selector used to style multiple elements.
A group of students taught together.
Inheritance
An OOP concept where a class derives properties from another class.
React
A JavaScript library for building user interfaces.
To respond to an action or event.
API
Application Programming Interface - a set of rules for software communication.
Framework
A reusable set of libraries and tools for software development.
A structural plan or supporting system.
Cloud
Remote servers used for data storage and computing over the internet.
Cache
A hardware or software component that stores data for quick retrieval.
A hidden storage area.
